General.Name: Dragon Mining Ltd
General.Description: Dragon Mining Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the exploration, evaluation, and development of gold projects in the Nordic region. It is involved in mining and processing gold ores and concentrates; and production and sale of gold bullion. The company was incorporated in 1990 and is headquartered in South Perth, Australia.
General.Address: 77 South Perth Esplanade, South Perth, WA, Australia, 6151
